docs.description: Use for project architecture, module plans, purpose, design, and tasks

frontend-plan.description: Use for frontend implementation: routes, components, services, modals

backend-plan.description: Use for backend implementation: modules, entities, endpoints, DTOs

frontend.description: Generates Angular + Ionic components, pages, services, modals, and routes

backend.description: Generates NestJS modules, entities, controllers, services, DTOs, and guards

auth.description: Implements authentication: login page, PIN + JWT flow, guards for both frontend and backend

recepcion.description: Implements reception module: lot registration, QR labels, medication autocomplete

inventario.description: Implements inventory module: stock panel, thresholds, physical count, alerts

dispensacion.description: Implements dispensation module: 3-step scan flow, patient registration, dose validation

historial.description: Implements patient history module: dispensation history lookup and detail views

admin.description: Implements administration module: user CRUD, system configuration, role management
